name: Pylon
description: A platform for customer support and helpdesk workflows that provides a RESTful developer API for interacting with account and product data.

auth_methods.note: Authentication uses Bearer tokens provided in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer <token>). The docs state admin users create API tokens in the Pylon dashboard.

credential_access.note: Docs explicitly state API tokens are created by Admin users in the Pylon dashboard, implying credentials must be created by an admin rather than self-serve by any end-user.

api_surface.note: Official docs are a REST API (endpoints like GET /api/v1/me referenced). The docs are the API root. The breadth (whether most product objects are covered) is not fully documented on a single page; the API reference exists but the fetch did not enumerate all endpoints to classify broad vs narrow.

buildability.note: Although the API is documented and uses bearer tokens, API tokens must be generated by Admin users in the dashboard, so a developer without admin access cannot self-serve obtain working credentials. This blocks building immediately for a typical external developer account.

queries: Pylon API authentication bearer token docs
Pylon API token create dashboard admin
